label: EU AI Act entered into force
summary: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 entered into force on 1 August 2024, with phased application after that date.

label: EU AI Act phased application
summary: The Act applies through phased deadlines; the next broad deadline tracked here is 2 August 2026.
verificationNotes: This milestone intentionally uses a broad next-deadline cue. Detailed article-by-article deadlines should be added as separate rows before legal reliance.

label: EU member-state competent-authority deadline
summary: The Commission describes 2 August 2025 as the deadline for Member States to designate and empower national competent authorities under the AI Act.
sourceName: European Commission - Governance and enforcement of the AI Act
verificationNotes: Official Commission page states that each Member State should have designated and empowered national competent authorities until 2 August 2025. This milestone tracks the EU-level deadline, not verified country-by-country designations.

label: GPAI Code of Practice published
summary: The General-Purpose AI Code of Practice is tracked as voluntary EU implementation guidance for providers of GPAI models under the AI Act.
sourceName: European Commission - General-Purpose AI Code of Practice
verificationNotes: Official Commission page states that the Code was published on 10 July 2025, is voluntary, and helps providers demonstrate compliance with AI Act GPAI obligations.

label: CoE AI Convention adopted; not yet in force in snapshot
summary: The Convention was adopted and opened for signature, but the snapshot notes that entry-into-force conditions had not yet been met.
sourceName: Council of Europe - Framework Convention on Artificial Intelligence

label: Korea AI Basic Act adopted; application begins in 2026
summary: Korea's AI Basic Act is tracked as adopted with application beginning in 2026.

label: China generative-AI measures in force
summary: China's Interim Measures for generative-AI services are tracked as in force for public-facing generative-AI services.
sourceName: CAC - Interim Measures for Generative AI Services

label: California SB 53 signed
summary: California SB 53 is tracked as a binding state-level frontier-AI transparency law after signing.

label: Brazil PL 2338/2023 under consideration
summary: Brazil's AI framework bill remains tracked as proposed until enactment is verified.

label: Türkiye draft AI law under consideration
summary: Türkiye's draft AI law remains tracked as proposed pending official enactment.
sourceName: Grand National Assembly of Türkiye - Draft AI Law

label: Mexico federal AI proposal tracked
summary: Mexico's federal AI proposal is retained as proposed and not counted as binding law.

label: Norway AI Act implementation consultation
summary: Norway is tracked as proposed/implementation planning for EEA alignment with the EU AI Act.

label: UK pro-innovation AI regulation response issued
summary: The UK cross-regulator principles approach is tracked as guidance and institutional implementation context, not as an omnibus AI statute.

label: UK Artificial Intelligence (Regulation) Bill in House of Lords
summary: Private member's bill tracked as proposed; it is not counted as enacted UK AI law.

label: Italy Law No. 132/2025 in force
summary: Italy's national artificial-intelligence law is tracked as in force and includes competent-authority designations for EU AI Act implementation.

label: Italy designates ACN and AGID roles
summary: The Italian law record tracks ACN and AGID as competent national authorities for AI-system monitoring and inspection.

label: Slovenia EU AI Act implementation law in force
summary: Slovenia's EU AI Act implementation law is tracked as in force from the official PISRS record.

label: Germany draft EU AI Act implementation bill
summary: German implementation activity is tracked as draft/proposed pending promulgation.
sourceName: German Bundestag - EU AI Act implementation bill

label: France EU AI Act implementation activity tracked
summary: French activity is tracked as implementation context and supervisory work; no comprehensive national implementation act is counted here.

label: Spain draft AI law approved as preliminary draft
summary: Spain's EU AI Act implementation draft is tracked as proposed and not as an enacted national AI law.
sourceName: La Moncloa - Council of Ministers reference
